task: Bounded EC2 runtime discovery after local ComfyUI runtime was not found

commands_run.name: identity_precheck
commands_run.details: AWS account, EC2 identity, EBS volume, and stopped state were verified in readiness evidence before start.

commands_run.name: start_instance_attempt_1
commands_run.details: Instance started from stopped and reached running/status-ok. SSM was Online. Run Command payload failed before remote execution because PowerShell/AWS CLI quoting malformed the parameters JSON.

commands_run.name: stop_instance_attempt_1
commands_run.details: Stop was attempted after the malformed Run Command payload and final state was verified stopped.

commands_run.name: start_instance_attempt_2
commands_run.details: Instance started from stopped and reached running/status-ok for retry with file-based --cli-input-json payload.

commands_run.name: stop_instance_attempt_2
commands_run.details: Stop was attempted after discovery and final state was verified stopped.

errors.message: Initial AWS CLI --parameters payload was malformed by PowerShell quoting. Retried with --cli-input-json temp file and SSM command succeeded.

next_action: Start EC2 only for a bounded project sync task, clone or update Comfy_UI_Main under a stable remote path, then stop EC2 again before workflow execution.
